emails.subject: Re: cannon assignment
emails.body: Daren, Should I change the counterparty on this sale, or is that handled by marketing? Also, we may need to look at changing the Storage Agmt. Please advise. Mary Forwarded by Mary Poorman/NA/Enron on 12/14/2000 07:26 AM Julie Meyers@ECT 12/13/2000 05:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: cannon assignment
emails.body: I moved the Cannon sale volumes from #170335 to #529753 effective 12/14/00. You will need to re-nom #529753 for all prior days at zero and then allocate volumes at each meter from the old deal to the new deal. Let me know if you have any questions. D Mary Poorman@ENRON 12/14/2000 07:28 AM
